about.pageDesc: Discover the history and capabilities of Shengfang Metal
about.introTitle: Rooted in Yuhuan, Serving the World
about.introP1: Yuhuan Shengfang Metal Products Co., Ltd. was established in November 2013, located in the beautiful coastal city of Taizhou-Yuhuan. Yuhuan is renowned for its rich and unique industrial clusters, known as China's automotive parts base.
about.introP2: Shengfang Metal specializes in the design, manufacturing, assembly and service of precision automotive hardware, valves, turned parts, forgings, and cold heading parts. With rapid development since founding, the company operates a 10,000㎡ facility with 102 employees and 120+ imported precision CNC machines.
about.introP3: With a team of skilled manufacturing and management professionals, we provide premium products and services recognized by domestic and international clients alike.
